title: Third-trimester nutrition
excerpt: Higher energy and micronutrient needs, practical meal ideas, and warning signs in the final months — ACOG and NHS references.
content:
## Features of the third trimester

The baby gains weight rapidly; you may feel full quickly. Quality over empty calories matters.

## Priorities

- Protein at each meal (fish, chicken, tofu, eggs — fully cooked).
- Iron and vitamin C combinations.
- Calcium from dairy or fortified alternatives.
- Fiber and water for constipation.

## Practical tips

- Smaller, more frequent meals if heartburn.
- Continue safe, cooked seafood 2–3 times per week where advised.
- Limit sugary drinks.

## Seek urgent care for

Severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling, reduced fetal movement, or heavy bleeding.

metaDescription: What to prioritize in the last trimester: protein, iron, calcium, fiber, and hydration.
